ASR Outdoor Snapatite 4 in 1 Utensil Set Lightweight Pocket-sized Cutlery 4pc

Eat lunch or your favorite snacks on the go with the ASR Outdoor Snapatite 4 in 1 Utensil Set!

Key Features

  • ASR Outdoor 4 Piece Snap Utensil Set - Multi-colored
  • Snapped Together Length: 6.75" | Pocket-sized
  • 4 in 1 Function: Spoon, Fork, Knife & Bottle Opener on Each Piece
  • BPA Free Plastic & Dishwasher Safe
  • Knife Sheathed When Not In Use for Safety

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROSNAP4PCUT
  • UPC: 060886830467
  • Color: Multicolor

This set comes with 4 complete utensil sets - each piece comes apart to reveal a spoon, fork, knife and bottle opener. When you're done eating, you can simply snap the knife and spoon piece back into the fork piece with the bottle opener.

These utensils are constructed of durable BPA free plastic, and they are dishwasher safe. They're lightweight and pocket-sized, making them ideal for travel, camping, hiking, road trips and more. Make sure to keep one of these sets in your bag, backpack, car or camping gear for your next adventure!
